message:
chore(node): update verification artifacts, Cargo.lock, and beads metadata

Concurrent agent updates:

- artifacts/10.15/ambient_authority_findings.json: continued finding updates
- artifacts/10.16/substrate_dependency_matrix.json: major dependency matrix
  update with reformatted and expanded substrate dependency data
- artifacts/15/migration_cohort_validation_{log,summary}: cohort validation
  updates reflecting module improvements
- artifacts/section_10_12/: verification evidence updates for bd-2aj
- artifacts/section_10_13/: verification evidence updates across 20+ beads
  (bd-12h8, bd-17mb, bd-19u, bd-1d7n, bd-1p2b, bd-1vvs, bd-29ct, bd-29w6,
  bd-2eun, bd-2k74, bd-2m2b, bd-2t5u, bd-2vs4, bd-2yc4, bd-35by, bd-3b8m,
  bd-3cm3, bd-3i9o, bd-3n2u, bd-3n58, bd-3tzl, bd-3ua7)
- Cargo.lock: toml dependency addition
- .beads/issues.jsonl: concurrent metadata updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
